name: Phillips 66
description: Phillips 66 is a prominent American multinational energy company headquartered in Houston, Texas. With a history spanning nearly 150 years, the company operates across a diverse value chain that includes refining, midstream, chemicals, marketing, and renewable fuels. Phillips 66 is dedicated to safely delivering reliable energy solutions while focusing on operational excellence, innovation, and sustainability. By leveraging its integrated portfolio, the company works to meet global energy needs today while investing in technologies and strategies to support the future of energy and improve lives in the communities where it operates.
